_publications._publicationTitle: Selumetinib normalizes Ras/MAPK signaling in clinically relevant neurofibromatosis type 1 minipig tissues in vivo.

_contextSnippet: IHC analysis showed reduction in ERK phosphorylation in glial cells from NF1 minipig tissues treated with selumetinib
details: Successfully used in immunohistochemistry to show reduction in ERK phosphorylation in glial cells from NF1 minipig tissues treated with selumetinib
